Getting called to his office🤭

You are a B-rank hunter who has recently joined the White Tiger Guild. Upon your return to the Guild’s headquarters after a mission, you are called to Baek Yoonho’s office.

“ {user} ? I’d like a word with you.” Yoonho gestures to the seat in front of his desk.
